basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 353 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Siddharthnagar District
basic_details.short_information: Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Bharti 2026: The District Program Officer's Office, Siddharthnagar has issued a notification (Letter No. C-1262/District Program Officer/Anganwadi Worker Selection/Notification/2026-27, dated 07.07.2026) for the recruitment of 353 vacant Anganwadi Worker posts in various Child Development Project areas of the district. Interested and eligible female candidates can apply online on the official website upanganwadibharti.in. All important information related to this recruitment – ​​vacancy details, qualification, age limit, documents and application process – is given bel

application_fee.details: The application fee is not mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: The minimum age for the post of Anganwadi worker is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years . Candidate must be 18 years of age as on 01.07.2026 (reference date of minimum age). Regarding age, only the date of birth mentioned in the high school mark sheet/certificate will be valid.

qualification.details: The minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi worker will be Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. The maximum educational qualification will be valid up to Postgraduate and the merit will be prepared on this basis.

salary_details.details: The official notification does not mention the salary/honorarium for the post of Anganwadi worker.

selection_process: poverty line status) will be followed in the selection. The merit of the candidates will be prepared on the basis of maximum educational qualification (up to post graduation). For widows
a death certificate issued by the village panchayat officer/the concerned municipal body and a certified copy of the family register will be valid. For divorcees/abandoned women
legal orders issued by the Honorable Court will be valid.
how_to_apply: Find the notification/link of Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026-27 released for Siddharthnagar district.
Fill the online application form in the prescribed format correctly and carefully.
Upload self-attested, clean and legible copies of the required documents at the designated place.
Review the form and submit the final application before the last date of 28th July 2026.
important_instructions: The application form will be accepted only online; any application/document sent offline or by post will not be accepted. A candidate cannot apply for more than one centre or post; such applications will not be accepted. Only a maximum of two women from a family will be appointed to the post of Anganwadi worker/assistant. The number of vacant posts may increase or decrease. If there is any error in the application or any fact/data/marks/total marks of educational record is found to be incorrect or forged (fake), the candidature will be cancelled. Only those residence and caste certificates and income certificates will be valid which can be verified online.

content_sections.heading: Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026: Important Dates

rows.event: Date of issue of original Government Order
Date of issue of recruitment notification
Reference date for calculation of minimum age

content_sections.heading: Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Worker Vacancy Details (Project Wise)
content_sections.text: A total of 353 Anganwadi worker positions are vacant across 15 child development projects/areas in Siddharthnagar district. Category-wise details are provided in the table below. Complete details of vacant posts village-wise/ward-wise are available on the Anganwadi Recruitment Portal upanganwadibharti.in and on the notice boards of the Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, all tehsils, all development blocks and all Child Development Project Offices of the district.

content_sections.heading: Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Only female candidates will be eligible to apply for this post. Widow/legally divorced/abandoned woman, resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward (in urban areas), belonging to a family living below the poverty line, will be given first preference. If a widow/abandoned woman living below the poverty line is not found, then preference will be given to another woman living below the poverty line. In case of non-availability of candidates as mentioned above, women residents of the same Gram Sabha/Ward (in urban areas) and belonging to families living above the poverty line can apply. Applications made by the same candidate for more than one centre or post will not be valid. Only a maximum of two women from a family will be appointed to the post of Anganwadi worker/assistant.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: The minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi worker will be Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. The maximum educational qualification will be valid up to Postgraduate and the merit will be prepared on this basis.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The minimum age for the post of Anganwadi worker is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years . Candidate must be 18 years of age as on 01.07.2026 (reference date of minimum age). Regarding age, only the date of birth mentioned in the high school mark sheet/certificate will be valid.

content_sections.heading: Salary
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention the salary/honorarium for the post of Anganwadi worker.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee is not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The above preference order (widow/divorcee/abandoned, poverty line status) will be followed in the selection. The merit of the candidates will be prepared on the basis of maximum educational qualification (up to post graduation). For widows, a death certificate issued by the village panchayat officer/the concerned municipal body and a certified copy of the family register will be valid. For divorcees/abandoned women, legal orders issued by the Honorable Court will be valid.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: High School Marksheet/Certificate (for age proof) Educational Qualification Certificate (Intermediate to Post Graduate, as applicable) Residence Certificate – Issued online with digital signature only from Tehsil, which can be verified online Caste Certificate (for applicable category) – Issued online from Tehsil only with digital signature, verifiable online Income Certificate – Issued from the competent level and verifiable online in accordance with Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Ra0-9 dated 30.09.2021 (as amended) of Revenue Section-9 of the Government of Uttar Pradesh For Widow: Death Certificate (issued by Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned Municipal Body) and certified copy of Family Register For divorced/abandoned women: Legal order issued by a competent court Self-signed, clean and legible copy of all documents (for online upload)

content_sections.heading: Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official website upanganwadibharti.in . Find the notification/link of Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026-27 released for Siddharthnagar district. Fill the online application form in the prescribed format correctly and carefully. Upload self-attested, clean and legible copies of the required documents at the designated place. Review the form and submit the final application before the last date of 28th July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The application form will be accepted only online; any application/document sent offline or by post will not be accepted. A candidate cannot apply for more than one centre or post; such applications will not be accepted. Only a maximum of two women from a family will be appointed to the post of Anganwadi worker/assistant. The number of vacant posts may increase or decrease. If there is any error in the application or any fact/data/marks/total marks of educational record is found to be incorrect or forged (fake), the candidature will be cancelled. Only those residence and caste certificates and income certificates will be valid which can be verified online.

faq.question: Q1. How many total posts are there in Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 353 Anganwadi worker posts are vacant in 15 child development projects of Siddharthnagar district.

faq.question: Q2. Where to apply online for Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online application can be made on the official website upanganwadibharti.in .

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification for Anganwadi worker recruitment?
faq.answer: Minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent; maximum qualification up to Post Graduation will be considered for merit.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the post of Anganwadi worker?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35. Candidates must have attained the age of 18 years as on 01.07.2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date for Siddharthnagar Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Can male candidates apply for this post?
faq.answer: No, only female candidates are eligible for the post of Anganwadi worker.

faq.question: Q7. Which women will be given preference in this recruitment?
faq.answer: First preference will be given to a widow/divorced/abandoned woman living below the poverty line, resident of the same Gram Sabha/ward; if such a woman is not available, preference will be given to another woman below the poverty line, then to a woman above the poverty line respectively.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for Anganwadi Worker Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is not mentioned in the official notification.
